title: Egyptian Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty, flavorful Middle Eastern-inspired casserole featuring tender lamb and crunchy crispy topping.
instructions: In a large pan, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, cumin, and cinnamon. Cook for 1 minute.
Add lamb mince. Cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the lamb mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with crumbled feta cheese and crispy bread cubes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the topping is crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
